title: tonestus aberrans
intro: Tonestus aberrans, also known as Himalayan fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been shown to exhibit wound-healing properties. The health benefits of Tonestus aberrans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and treat various respiratory issues. Tonestus aberrans can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
